_doc: The PERMANENT home for his-hand atoms — the levers only Anthony can pull. A his-hand task NEVER hangs on him or in a recall-only memory file; it hangs HERE, in git, and obligations-view.py unions these into the obligations face beside the mail levers. This file is separate from obligations-ledger.json ON PURPOSE: the mail builder regenerates that ledger every sweep, which would wipe any lever placed in it — these survive regen. Add/retire a lever by editing this file; nothing here is ever auto-pulled. Source: the needs_human digest reduction (37 tasks -> 8 human actions) plus the per-session closeout atoms. Generic mail-credential levers are NOT duplicated here (they live as L-MCP / L-IMAP-APP-PW / L-OAUTH in the ledger); the ONE exception is L-GMAIL-CRED, which corrects their misleading 'generate a credential' framing (the app-pw already exists — one paste lands it).
spine: 10 human actions own the whole revenue + go-live spine; the first two (merge gate + accounts) move the most, and L-ENC1101-GOLIVE is time-boxed to 6/25. Surfaced once, never nagged, never forced.

levers.label: Open the merge gate: say "open the merge gate" and merge-drain.py squash-merges exactly the clean set in docs/MERGE-READY.md (20 PRs, revenue-first, branches deleted, never force-merged).
levers.note: Ground-truth: only 20 of 200 open PRs are clean; the 138 CI-red are fleet HEAL work, not your hand.

levers.label: Revenue first-dollar accounts: create Ko-fi + GitHub Sponsors on the Exporter, create a LemonSqueezy product and paste LEMONSQUEEZY_STORE_ID into CI. FUNDING.yml + Pro-tier checkout are already staged — only account creation is missing.

Stop the recurring 'Not logged in' flap: the 24/7 fleet and your interactive session share ONE rotating Keychain OAuth token, so the fleet keeps rotating it out from under your login. Staged cascade fixes it (branch fix/claude-credential-race). Rung 0 self-heals on deploy with NONE of the steps done.
levers.cost: ~3 min once, durable · Rung 0 free the moment it deploys
levers.unlocks: stable Claude auth across the fleet + your session
steps: bash scripts/set-credential.sh LIMEN_CLAUDE_AUTH_TOKEN   # or LIMEN_CLAUDE_API_KEY if probe says wiped
deploy fix/claude-credential-race (reconcile divergence first; dispatch.py picked up next beat, no restart)

levers.label: Cloudflare deploy auth: run `wrangler login` (or export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN into the lane env), then re-dispatch. Every BLD2-*-deploy fails because wrangler isn't authenticated.
levers.unlocks: 16 BLD2 deploys — all 6 revenue products go live

levers.label: One-container cutover: mount an external backup, run container/migrate.sh S4-S13, confirm symlinks + the COMPLETE marker. ASK-20 extends container/manifest.tsv to relocate ~/.claude, ~/.codex, ~/.gemini. Irreversible and backup-gated — the durability the whole organism stands on.
Provide JWT_SECRET + org_id so PR #234's security gate passes (organvm/public-record-data-scrapper).
Give gh a token under launchd (GH_TOKEN in the plist/keychain) so the soak-test LaunchAgent's gh auth works (organvm/organvm-engine).

Authorize branch-protection rules across the organ repos (needs admin; run the descent script). URGENT for organvm/limen `main`: it was CI-poisoned twice by direct pushes that bypass CI (f9325a8 ruff, 3069587 web) — each landed red on main and jammed the whole merge-drain until hand-fixed (#78). Require the python/web/worker status checks on main so no un-CI'd commit lands again.
levers.unlocks: branch protection fleet-wide + no more main CI-poison jams
levers.note: Root cause: CI lints/builds PRs only, not direct pushes, so an un-gated push lands red on main and poisons every open PR's merge. When you protect main, decide the daemon's content-push path: route its commits through the merge organ, or exempt the limen[bot]/App actor so studium dailies still flow.
steps: GitHub → organvm/limen → Settings → Branches → protect `main`: require status checks python, web, worker (limen-specific, ~2 min)
Fleet-wide: run the descent script to apply the same across the organ repos
Decide the daemon's direct-push path: route via the merge organ, or exempt the App actor

levers.label: Take ENC1101 Summer 2026 (771624) live in D2L — content is 100% staged; only your cadence call + a label greenlight + the Set Active click remain. Read edu-organism/classes/enc1101-summer-2026/prep/GO-LIVE-BRIEF.md (one page). (1) Confirm the 6-week cadence in prep/schedule-summer2026.md ('cadence is good' or name dates to move); (2) greenlight the §3 fix — the staged announcement drip mislabeled the back half a 'Research Essay' but shell Unit 4 = Problem/Solution Essay (250-pt capstone); the corrected import is staged at prep/instructor-layer-ready/announcements-summer2026-IMPORT-aligned.csv (dates unchanged, original untouched). Then I browser-drive dates + announcements + intelligent agent; you click Set Offering to Active; I verify Student View.
levers.cost: ~2 min decision + a Set Active click; then ~30 min I co-drive via Claude-in-Chrome
levers.gate: your cadence-confirm + §3 greenlight + the Set Active click (outward/identity — never automated)
steps: Confirm the 6-week cadence in prep/schedule-summer2026.md (or name dates to move)
Greenlight the §3 relabel (use the -IMPORT-aligned.csv when posting)
I browser-drive: syllabus → Manage Dates → announcements → intelligent agent
You click Set Offering to Active; I verify Student View

levers.label: Revive the autonomous mail lane with ONE paste — the app-password ALREADY EXISTS (op://Private/gmail-app-pw-2026-06-06); nothing needs generating. This supersedes the generic L-IMAP-APP-PW/L-OAUTH framing (which implies you must create a credential — you don't). The single endpoint is the GitHub secret GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD on organvm/domus (currently unset). Once set, the C_MAIL voice's keyless drafts/sweep path has its credential and inbox-clean is no longer gated on you. Value streams op→gh, never on screen.
levers.unlocks: headless C_MAIL drafts/sweep — inbox-clean no longer gated on you
levers.gate: credential-write classifier (the secret itself already exists)
steps: op read op://Private/gmail-app-pw-2026-06-06/password | gh secret set GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD -R organvm/domus
OR add a Bash allow-rule Bash(gh secret set:*) so any session lands it autonomically
OR run one `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions` session — the agent lands it
